span.p:
Fall through to TempToken lane
see 05-auth-validation.mmd

div.style: color: rgb(153, 0, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

color: rgb(0, 0, 102) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Headers complete?
Fingerprint + Timestamp + Nonce + Signature

div.style: color: rgb(153, 0, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
color: rgb(0, 0, 102) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
abs now - X-GL-Timestamp
less or equal ReplayWindowSeconds
default 300s?

span.p:
Parsed RepoUrl
resolves to RepoId
equal SshKey.RepoId?

div.style: color: rgb(153, 0, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
color: rgb(0, 0, 102) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Acceptance + Branch
per GitProfile rules
see 05-auth-validation.mmd steps 3-4

div.style: color: rgb(153, 0, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
INSERT OR IGNORE
SshNonce SshKeyId Nonce
affected rows = 1?

div.style: color: rgb(153, 0, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
color: rgb(0, 0, 102) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
ssh-keygen -Y verify
namespace git-logs@v2
over canonical signing string

span.p:
Accept -> proceed to handler
UPDATE SshKey LastUsedAt
AuditTrail SshAuthSuccess
